name: Implement POST /groups/generate-presigned-urls for file uploads
description: Develop backend endpoint to generate presigned URLs for uploading DOCX and Excel documents to cloud storage.

name: Implement AI Sprint Generation API with document parsing
description: Develop POST /groups/{group_id}/sprints/generation endpoint. Must include logic to parse DOCX and Excel files and integrate with LLM for task generation.

name: Implement RBAC for AI planning features
description: Restrict access to AI generation and planning tools to users with Owner or Manager roles only.

name: Develop UI for document upload and additional context input
description: Create frontend components for file selection (DOCX/Excel) and a text area for users to provide additional AI instructions.

name: Develop Preview and Edit interface for AI-generated tasks
description: Build a UI to display AI-generated tasks in a list/table format allowing users to modify or confirm tasks before saving.

name: Implement Task Status Classification logic
description: Develop backend logic to categorize tasks into DONE, NOT_DONE, EARLY, ON_TIME, LATE, and SPILLOVER based on date comparisons.

name: Implement Burndown Chart Engine and Metric calculations
description: Develop service to calculate daily expected vs actual burndown values and aggregate metrics like completion rate and spillover.

name: Implement GET /groups/{group_id}/sprints/{sprint_id}/export for Excel
description: Develop backend endpoint to generate and download an Excel file containing the sprint work list and metrics.

name: Develop UI for Sprint Burndown Chart and Metrics dashboard
description: Create data visualizations for the burndown chart and a summary panel for sprint performance metrics.
